title: CLOTHES THAT WORK - 211info
text: HELPING HANDS RESOURCES CLOTHES THAT WORK Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assistance with acquiring appropriate clothing for individuals seeking employment, attending a job interview, or just starting new employment. 1755 13th Street SE Salem, OR 97302 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday/Tuesday/Wednesday/Thursday/Saturday 9am-noon, closed holidays Email (503) 364-9936 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (503) 364-9936 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment or walk in FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Zip codes 97071, 97086, 97137, 97301, 97302, 97303, 97304, 97305, 97350 TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on 13th Street just south of Rural Street, and north of Hoyt Street. Services: Work Clothing Other Services Offered At This Location: MATERIAL GOODS - HELPING HANDS RESOURCES CLOTHING ASSISTANCE MATERIAL GOODS - WORK WEAR If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
